# Market Context for Tandem Perovskite Solar Cells

Competing programs as of 2025:
- **Helios Labs — Solaris**: 32% target by 2027, tandem cell, utility-scale
- **Selene Energy — Lunaris**: 26% target by 2026, single-junction, residential
- **Apex Photonics — Helia-X**: 30% target by 2028, tandem cell, commercial

Analyst firms frequently disagree on degradation assumptions, which drives
diverging probability estimates for any single program. Independent degradation
testing under the IEC 61215 standard is the most common tiebreaker, but few
programs have released 2025 outdoor data yet.
